args.query: SELECT oi.Id, oi.OrderId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name FROM OrderItem oi JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE oi.OrderId = '801Wt00000PHRYWIA5' AND LOWER(p.Name) LIKE '%ai processing unit%'
